Steps: Save with English data source USDA | Save with Arabic data source وزارة الصحة | Save with mixed data source USDA وزارة الصحة | Save with URL-like/plain source text | Save with exactly 120-character data_source | Submit 121-character data_source | Observe field error and form state
Expected Result: English, Arabic, mixed, URL-like/plain source text, and exactly 120-character data_source values are accepted and safely displayed. 121-character data_source is rejected; Arabic field-level error appears under Data source: القيمة أعلى من الحد المسموح. The user-entered value is preserved for correction.
UI/UX Coverage: Data source input remains usable and preserves input on error.
RTL / Arabic Coverage: Arabic and mixed data source remains readable in RTL.
Accessibility Coverage: Data source error is associated with the data_source field via accessible error relationship.
API / Backend Coverage: Create/update API rejects data_source above 120 chars and accepts valid data_source text.
Data Integrity Coverage: Data source remains optional metadata and is stored/displayed as plain text.
Notes: Added to close data_source language, exact max, Arabic error, placement, and preservation gaps. Feature ID: F-019/F-027/F-039.

Requirement / Acceptance Criteria Refere: F-019; F-027; F-039; D-024; D-025; nutrition_basis tampered option exact Arabic message
Preconditions: User can submit Food create/update through API or request interception.
Test Data: nutrition_basis = per_serving; valid values for all other required fields.
Steps: Submit create or update request with nutrition_basis=per_serving | Observe API response and UI field mapping | Repeat with valid per_100g and per_100ml values if not already covered
Expected Result: Tampered nutrition_basis is rejected. UI/API maps the error to nutrition_basis. Exact Arabic field-level error appears: اختر قيمة صحيحة. Only per_100g and per_100ml are accepted.
UI/UX Coverage: Invalid select option is shown near Nutrition basis and input remains available for correction.
RTL / Arabic Coverage: Arabic invalid-option message is readable in RTL.
Accessibility Coverage: nutrition_basis field exposes aria-invalid and associated error text.
API / Backend Coverage: API rejects invalid enum value and returns structured field-level validation for nutrition_basis.
Data Integrity Coverage: Invalid source-of-truth nutrition basis cannot be persisted.
Notes: Added as dedicated exact-copy case even though FOOD-TC-069 was refined. Feature ID: F-019/F-027/F-039.

Requirement / Acceptance Criteria Refere: F-025; F-027; F-039; D-026; structured optional nutrient API field errors
Preconditions: User can submit Food create/update through API or request interception.
Test Data: Case A: fiber_g=-0.1 with otherwise valid data. Case B: vitamin_d_mcg=250.01 with otherwise valid data.
Steps: Submit Case A | Inspect API/UI error mapping | Submit Case B | Inspect API/UI error mapping
Expected Result: Case A is rejected with field=fiber_g and Arabic message under Fiber: القيمة الغذائية الإضافية لا يمكن أن تكون أقل من 0. Case B is rejected with field=vitamin_d_mcg and Arabic message under Vitamin D: القيمة الغذائية الإضافية أعلى من الحد المسموح. User input is preserved; no Food is saved.
UI/UX Coverage: Errors appear under the exact optional nutrient fields and optional section opens if collapsed.
RTL / Arabic Coverage: Arabic optional nutrient errors are readable in RTL.
Accessibility Coverage: Invalid optional nutrient fields expose associated accessible errors.
API / Backend Coverage: API returns structured field-level validation for optional nutrient below-min and above-max failures.
Data Integrity Coverage: Invalid optional nutrients cannot be persisted.
Notes: Added to close optional nutrient field-specific API error mapping coverage gap. Feature ID: F-025/F-027/F-039.

Requirement / Acceptance Criteria Refere: F-019; F-027; F-039; D-024; D-025; BA Food name trim and required validation
Preconditions: User can access /foods/new or submit the Food create API.
Test Data: food_name/name = five spaces; nutrition_basis=per_100g; calories=100; protein_g=10; carb_g=15; fat_g=4; default_unit_type=serving; unit_amount=100; unit_basis=g.
Steps: Open /foods/new | Enter exactly five spaces in Food name | Fill every other required field with the listed valid data | Select Save | Inspect the Food name field, API request/response, success region, and Foods catalog
Expected Result: Food name is trimmed for validation and treated as empty. Save is blocked; no Food is created and no successful write response is accepted. Exact Arabic field-level error appears near Food name: هذا الحقل مطلوب. The field remains available for correction and may display either the entered whitespace or normalized empty value. No success message, saved-locally message, pending-sync state, local save, or offline queue appears.
UI/UX Coverage: Food name error appears next to the field; form remains open and other entered values are preserved.
RTL / Arabic Coverage: Exact Arabic required-field message is readable in RTL.
Accessibility Coverage: Food name exposes aria-invalid and the error is associated through aria-describedby or equivalent.
API / Backend Coverage: Create API rejects the normalized empty name and returns a structured field-level validation error; no success response is returned.
Data Integrity Coverage: No whitespace-only Food record is persisted and no client-side/offline record is created.
Notes: Added to close the explicit whitespace-only Food name coverage gap. Feature ID: F-019/F-027/F-039.
